title: For first time in 30 years, states and not armed groups are top killers of children in war, UN says

snapshot.title: For first time in 30 years, states and not armed groups are top killers of children in war, UN says
snapshot.description: NEW YORK CITY: For the first time since the UN’s mandate on children and armed conflict was established three decades ago, government forces, rather than nonstate armed groups, are responsible for the majority of grave violations against children, the latest report from the UN secretary-general revealed.
snapshot.author: Ephrem Kossaify
snapshot.pageTitle: For first time in 30 years, states and not armed groups are top killers of children in war, UN says | Arab News
